teleport.description: Moves the entity (and any contained items) to `destination`; returns 0 on invalid destination, removed entity, or locked container. Clears the `bankOpenLoc` ObjVar on players.

teleportNoFall.name: teleportNoFall
teleportNoFall.description: Like `teleport` but skips post-move spatial notifications (no item-fall physics). Returns 0 on failure.

random.name: random
random.description: Returns a random integer in `[min, max]` inclusive; returns 0 when `max < min`.

dice.name: dice
dice.description: Rolls `numDice` dice each with `numSides` sides and returns the sum.

deleteObject.name: deleteObject
deleteObject.description: Deletes the entity and refreshes nearby clients; players are silently protected from deletion.

deleteObjectNoFall.name: deleteObjectNoFall
deleteObjectNoFall.description: Like `deleteObject` but skips post-delete spatial notifications (no item-fall physics); players are protected.

putObjContainer.name: putObjContainer
putObjContainer.description: Moves `thing` into `container`; refuses mobiles, locked containers, and self-containment. Returns 1 on success.

toMobile.name: toMobile
toMobile.description: Equips `thing` on `mobile`; applies the same checks as `putObjContainer`. Returns 1 on success.

putMobContainer.name: putMobContainer
putMobContainer.description: Moves a mobile into another mobile's container without the safety checks of `putObjContainer`. Returns 1 on success.

equipObj.name: equipObj
equipObj.cSignature: int Script_equipObj(uint32_t itemSerial, uint32_t targetSerial, int layer)
equipObj.signature: int equipObj(obj item, obj mobile, int layer)
equipObj.description: Equips `item` on `mobile` at `layer`; on failure the item is returned to its tracked location. Returns 1 on success.

dropObj.name: dropObj
dropObj.description: Drops `entity` at `loc`; thin wrapper around `teleport`. Returns 1 on success, 0 on failure.

walk.name: walk
walk.description: Steps the mobile one tile in direction `dir` (0–7); returns 1 on success, 0 if direction is invalid or WalkCheck refuses.

run.name: run
run.description: Like `walk` but sets the run bit (0x80) on the direction; returns 1 on success, 0 on failure.

setType.name: setType
setType.description: Changes the entity's body/graphic type; resurrects dead players first, handles resource-entity recipe changes. Refreshes nearby clients.

setHue.name: setHue
setHue.description: Sets the entity's color and refreshes nearby clients.

setPartialHue.name: setPartialHue
setPartialHue.description: Like `setHue` but ORs in 0x8000 (the partial-hue flag) when the target is a mobile.

getDefaultTextHue.name: getDefaultTextHue
getDefaultTextHue.description: Returns the mobile's default speech hue.

setDefaultTextHue.name: setDefaultTextHue
setDefaultTextHue.description: Updates the mobile's default speech hue.

animateMobile.name: animateMobile
animateMobile.cSignature: void Script_animateMobile(uint32_t serial, int animType, int action, int frameCount, int repeat, int backwards)
animateMobile.signature: void animateMobile(obj mobile, int animType, int action, int frameCount, int repeat, int backwards)
animateMobile.description: Plays an animation clip on the mobile; either records into an active AnimSequence or broadcasts an ANIM packet to nearby clients. Validates action and frame count limits.

sfx.name: sfx
sfx.cSignature: void Script_sfx(CLocation *loc, int soundID, int volume)
sfx.signature: void sfx(loc position, int soundID, int volume)
sfx.description: Plays `soundID` at `loc` for all nearby players; records into an active AnimSequence if one is open. Validates coordinates and sound ID range (≤ 0x24B).

sfxTo.name: sfxTo
sfxTo.cSignature: void Script_sfxTo(uint32_t serial, int soundID, int volume)
sfxTo.signature: void sfxTo(obj player, int soundID, int volume)
sfxTo.description: Plays `soundID` for a single player only; records into an active AnimSequence if one is open.

musicTo.name: musicTo
musicTo.description: Sends a MUSIC packet to the named player, changing their background music.

getDirection.name: getDirection
getDirection.description: Returns a human-readable compass bearing string from `from` to `to` ("to the north", "to the southeast", etc.); returns "right here" for distances under 10 tiles.

getDistanceInTiles.name: getDistanceInTiles
getDistanceInTiles.description: Returns the Chebyshev (wrapping) distance in tiles between two locations.

getDistance.name: getDistance
getDistance.description: Returns a human-readable distance phrase ("right here", "just a short way", "a fair distance", "a long way", etc.) bucketed in tens of tiles.

interpose.name: interpose
interpose.description: Stores the midpoint between `a` and `b` (z taken from `a`) in the return location; also overwrites `a` with the midpoint as a side effect.

getFacing.name: getFacing
getFacing.description: Returns the mobile's current facing direction (0–7).

getHue.name: getHue
getHue.description: Returns the entity's current color value.

isFacingPlace.name: isFacingPlace
isFacingPlace.description: Returns 1 when the mobile's facing direction matches the bearing from its position to `position`.

isFacingPerson.name: isFacingPerson
isFacingPerson.description: Returns 1 when the mobile's facing direction matches the bearing toward `target`.

facingEachOther.name: facingEachOther
facingEachOther.description: Returns 1 when both mobiles are facing each other along the line between their positions.
aliases: facingEachOther — note: binary has a NULL-check bug where mob1 is checked twice instead of mob2

facingEachOther — note: binary has a NUL.name: facingEachOther — note: binary has a NULL-check bug where mob1 is checked twice instead of mob2
facingEachOther — note: binary has a NUL.signature: facingEachOther — note: binary has a NULL-check bug where mob1 is checked twice instead of mob2(obj mob1, obj mob2)
facingEachOther — note: binary has a NUL.description: Returns 1 when both mobiles are facing each other along the line between their positions.

faceHere.name: faceHere
faceHere.description: Sets the mobile's facing direction and refreshes nearby clients; silently ignores directions outside [0, 7].

getSex.name: getSex
getSex.description: Returns 0 for male (body 0x190), 1 for female (body 0x191), 2 for other body types.

sameSex.name: sameSex
sameSex.description: Returns 1 when both mobiles report the same sex.

isHuman.name: isHuman
isHuman.description: Returns 1 when the mobile uses a human or creature body type (as defined by `CMobile_IsCreatureBody`).

isHumanBodyType.name: isHumanBodyType
isHumanBodyType.description: Returns 1 when the mobile uses a human-shaped body type specifically.

isMobile.name: isMobile
isMobile.description: Returns 1 if the entity is a mobile (NPC or player).

isPlayer.name: isPlayer
isPlayer.description: Returns 1 if the entity is a player character.

isSpellbook.name: isSpellbook
isSpellbook.description: Returns 1 if the entity is a spellbook.

isContainer.name: isContainer
isContainer.description: Returns 1 if the entity is a container (including corpses and other container-derived types).

isRealContainer.name: isRealContainer
isRealContainer.description: Returns 1 only if the entity is a plain `CContainer`, not a subtype like corpse or spellbook.

isMap.name: isMap
isMap.description: Returns 1 if the entity is a map item.

isMap [index 674 also maps here].name: isMap [index 674 also maps here]
isMap [index 674 also maps here].description: Returns 1 if the entity is a map item.

isNPC.name: isNPC
isNPC.description: Returns 1 if the entity is an NPC mobile.

isShopkeeper.name: isShopkeeper
isShopkeeper.description: Returns 1 if the entity is a shopkeeper NPC.

isGuard.name: isGuard
isGuard.description: Returns 1 if the entity is a guard NPC.

isDead.name: isDead
isDead.description: Returns 1 if the mobile is dead.

isInContainer.name: isInContainer
isInContainer.description: Returns 1 if the entity is currently inside a container.

isEquipped.name: isEquipped
isEquipped.description: Returns 1 if the entity is currently equipped on a mobile.

isMoveable.name: isMoveable
isMoveable.description: Returns 1 when `player` is allowed to pick up and move `thing`.

isFreelyUsable.name: isFreelyUsable
isFreelyUsable.description: Returns 1 when `player` can use `thing` without additional permission checks.

isFreelyViewable.name: isFreelyViewable
isFreelyViewable.description: Returns 1 when `player` can see/inspect `thing` without additional permission checks.

isOnline.name: isOnline
isOnline.description: Returns 1 when the serial belongs to a currently logged-in player (pflags bit 2 set).

removePlayerFromGame.name: removePlayerFromGame
removePlayerFromGame.description: Disconnects an offline player slot; returns 1 when disconnected, 0 if player is online or not a player.

getEncumbrance.name: getEncumbrance
getEncumbrance.description: Returns the mobile's carry-weight encumbrance as a percentage; returns -1 when the mobile is not found.

containedBy.name: containedBy
containedBy.description: Returns the parent container's serial when the entity is inside a container, or 0 when on the ground or detached.

isNoDrawType.name: isNoDrawType
isNoDrawType.description: Returns 1 when `bodyType` refers to a tile flagged as non-rendered (NoDraw); returns 0 for out-of-range values.

bark.name: bark
bark.description: Unicode overload of `bark`; speaks unicode text from the entity, sending it as a unicode system message when the entity is held by a player.

ebark.name: ebark
ebark.description: Unicode overload of `ebark`; broadcasts unicode text from the entity as an emote.

barkTo.name: barkTo
barkTo.cSignature: void Script_barkToUnicode(uint32_t speakerSerial, uint32_t targetSerial, CUString *text)
barkTo.signature: void barkTo(obj speaker, obj target, ustring text)
barkTo.description: Unicode overload of `barkTo`; directed speech to a single player.

ebarkTo.name: ebarkTo
ebarkTo.cSignature: void Script_ebarkToUnicode(uint32_t speakerSerial, uint32_t targetSerial, CUString *text)
ebarkTo.signature: void ebarkTo(obj speaker, obj target, ustring text)
ebarkTo.description: Unicode overload of `ebarkTo`; directed emote to a single player.

barkToHued.name: barkToHued
barkToHued.cSignature: void Script_barkToHuedUnicode(uint32_t speakerSerial, uint32_t targetSerial, int hue, CUString *text)
barkToHued.signature: void barkToHued(obj speaker, obj target, int hue, ustring text)
barkToHued.description: Unicode overload of `barkToHued`; directed speech at explicit hue to a single player.

actionBark.name: actionBark
actionBark.cSignature: void Script_actionBark(uint32_t serial, int hue, CString *text1, CString *text2)
actionBark.signature: void actionBark(obj player, int hue, string selfText, string otherText)
actionBark.description: Sends `selfText` to the player as a self-message and broadcasts `otherText` to nearby observers, both at the given speech `hue`.

getObjType.name: getObjType
getObjType.description: Returns the entity's body type (graphic/tile ID).

getValue.name: getValue
getValue.description: Returns the item's current value via `VT_GET_VALUE`; returns 0 for missing or invalid entities.

makeValueless.name: makeValueless
makeValueless.description: Marks the item as decayed (calls `CItem_DecayProcess`) so it no longer carries a value; returns 1 on success, 0 when entity is missing.

isInCamp.name: isInCamp
isInCamp.description: Returns 1 when the player is standing near a campfire.

getWeight.name: getWeight
getWeight.description: Returns the entity's total weight (including contained items) via `VT_GET_WEIGHT`.

getLocation.name: getLocation
getLocation.description: Returns the entity's effective world location, walking the parent chain for contained items; falls back to `(-1, -1, 0)` when the entity is missing.

getRelayLoc.name: getRelayLoc
getRelayLoc.description: Returns the map origin `(g_mapStartX, g_mapStartY, 0)`; the `serial` argument is ignored entirely.

whereIs.name: whereIs
whereIs.description: Like `getLocation`: returns the root container's world location via `VT_GET_LOCATION`, falling back to `(-1, -1, 0)` when the entity is missing.

getMasterObjLoc.name: getMasterObjLoc
getMasterObjLoc.description: Returns the world location of the `index`-th master-object slot (`g_mapStartX + index`, `g_mapStartY`, 0); falls back to `(-1, -1, 0)` for indices outside [0, 127].

numInContainer.name: numInContainer
numInContainer.description: Returns the count of items directly inside the container entity; returns 0 when the entity is missing or not a container.

isRidable.name: isRidable
isRidable.description: Returns 1 when the mobile can be mounted (`CMobile_IsRideable`).

isRiding.name: isRiding
isRiding.description: Returns 1 when the mobile is currently mounted (`CMobile_IsMounted`).

unRide.name: unRide
unRide.description: Dismounts the mobile from its current mount (`CMobile_Dismount`); returns the dismount result or 0 on failure.

getAC.name: getAC
getAC.description: Returns the mobile's combat armor class via `Combat_CalcArmorClass`.

getMovementType.name: getMovementType
getMovementType.description: Returns the mobile's current movement type (low byte of vtable slot 0x94 result).

setMovementType.name: setMovementType
setMovementType.description: Sets the mobile's movement type; silently ignores values outside [0, 9].

getGeneric.name: getGeneric
getGeneric.description: Returns the total quantity of items with body type `type` carried by the mobile.

getMoney.name: getMoney
getMoney.description: Returns the total amount of gold (body type 0x0EED) carried by the mobile.

gainFame.name: gainFame
gainFame.description: Adds `amount` to the mobile's notoriety (despite the name, routes through `CMobile_GainNotoriety`); values above 255 are silently ignored.

loseFame.name: loseFame
loseFame.description: Subtracts `amount` from the mobile's notoriety (despite the name, routes through `CMobile_LoseNotoriety`); values above 255 are silently ignored.

returnObject.name: returnObject
returnObject.description: Removes the entity from the world (via `VT_HIDE` when present) then re-attaches it to its tracked origin via `VT_RETURN_TO_TRACKED`.

addNotoriety.name: addNotoriety
addNotoriety.description: Adds `amount` to the mobile's notoriety via `CMobile_ChangeNotoriety`; values above 255 are silently ignored.

removeNotoriety.name: removeNotoriety
removeNotoriety.description: Subtracts `amount` from the mobile's notoriety via `CMobile_ChangeNotorietyNeg`; values above 255 are silently ignored.

getNotoriety.name: getNotoriety
getNotoriety.description: Returns the mobile's raw notoriety value via `CMobile_GetNotoriety`.

getNotorietyLevel.name: getNotorietyLevel
getNotorietyLevel.description: Returns the mobile's bucketed notoriety level via `CMobile_GetNotoLevel`.

getNotorietyLevelByNot.name: getNotorietyLevelByNot
getNotorietyLevelByNot.description: Converts a raw notoriety value to its bucketed notoriety level via `NotoValueToLevel`; takes no entity argument.

setNotoriety.name: setNotoriety
setNotoriety.description: Sets the mobile's notoriety via `VT_SET_NOTORIETY`; silently ignores values outside [-127, 127].

getFame.name: getFame
getFame.description: Returns the mobile's fame value via `CMobile_GetFame`.

getAdjFame.name: getAdjFame
getAdjFame.description: Returns the mobile's adjusted (effective) fame value via `CMobile_GetAdjFame`.

getFameLevel.name: getFameLevel
getFameLevel.description: Returns the bucketed fame level for the mobile via `CMobile_GetFameLevel`.

changeFame.name: changeFame
changeFame.description: Adjusts the mobile's fame by a signed `amount` via `CMobile_ChangeFame`.

setFame.name: setFame
setFame.description: Sets the mobile's fame to `fame` via `CMobile_SetFame`; the validation string in the binary is `"getFame"` (copy-paste bug in original code).

getKarma.name: getKarma
getKarma.description: Returns the mobile's karma value via `CMobile_GetKarma`.

getAdjKarma.name: getAdjKarma
getAdjKarma.description: Returns the mobile's adjusted (effective) karma value via `CMobile_GetAdjKarma`.

getKarmaLevel.name: getKarmaLevel
getKarmaLevel.description: Returns the bucketed karma level for the mobile via `CMobile_GetKarmaLevel`.

changeKarma.name: changeKarma
changeKarma.description: Adjusts the mobile's karma by a signed `amount` via `CMobile_ChangeKarma`.

setKarma.name: setKarma
setKarma.description: Sets the mobile's karma to `karma` via `CMobile_SetKarma`; the validation string in the binary is `"getKarma"` (copy-paste bug in original code).

getCurHP.name: getCurHP
getCurHP.description: Returns the mobile's current HP via `CMobile_GetHp`.

getMaxHP.name: getMaxHP
getMaxHP.description: Returns the mobile's maximum HP via `CMobile_GetMaxHp`.

getCurFatigue.name: getCurFatigue
getCurFatigue.description: Returns the mobile's current stamina via `CMobile_GetStamina`.

getMaxFatigue.name: getMaxFatigue
getMaxFatigue.description: Returns the mobile's maximum stamina via `CMobile_GetMaxStamina`.

getCurMana.name: getCurMana
getCurMana.description: Returns the mobile's current mana via `CMobile_GetMana`.

getMaxMana.name: getMaxMana
getMaxMana.description: Returns the mobile's maximum mana via `CMobile_GetMaxMana`.

getCanCarry.name: getCanCarry
getCanCarry.description: Returns the mobile's maximum carry weight via `CMobile_GetMaxWeight`.

getSkillTotal.name: getSkillTotal
getSkillTotal.description: Returns the sum of all base skills on the mobile by iterating over every skill index from `CSkillManager_GetMaxSkills`.

getCappedSkillTotal.name: getCappedSkillTotal
getCappedSkillTotal.description: Returns the mobile's total skill weight (skills capped by the per-skill weight curve) via `CMobile_CalcTotalSkillWeight`.

getNaturalAC.name: getNaturalAC
getNaturalAC.description: Returns the mobile's bonus armor class via `CMobile_GetBonusAC`.

getHPLevel.name: getHPLevel
getHPLevel.description: Returns the mobile's current HP as a percentage of its maximum (`curHP * 100 / maxHP`).

getFatigueLevel.name: getFatigueLevel
getFatigueLevel.description: Returns the mobile's current stamina as a percentage of its maximum (`curStamina * 100 / maxStamina`).

getManaLevel.name: getManaLevel
getManaLevel.description: Returns the mobile's current mana as a percentage of its maximum (`curMana * 100 / maxMana`).

setCurHP.name: setCurHP
setCurHP.description: Sets the mobile's current HP via `VT_SET_HP` (with no broadcast flag).

setMaxHP.name: setMaxHP
setMaxHP.description: Sets the mobile's maximum HP via `VT_SET_MAX_HP` and immediately sends a stat update via `VT_SEND_HP_UPDATE`.

handleHealthGain.name: handleHealthGain
handleHealthGain.description: Sends a stat update to notify clients of the mobile's current HP via `VT_SEND_HP_UPDATE`; does not change the HP value.

setCurFatigue.name: setCurFatigue
setCurFatigue.description: Sets the mobile's current stamina via `VT_SET_STAMINA`; negative values are clamped to 0.

setMaxFatigue.name: setMaxFatigue
setMaxFatigue.description: Sets the mobile's maximum stamina via `VT_SET_MAX_STAMINA`.

setCurMana.name: setCurMana
setCurMana.description: Sets the mobile's current mana via `VT_SET_MANA`.

setMaxMana.name: setMaxMana
setMaxMana.description: Sets the mobile's maximum mana via `VT_SET_MAX_MANA`.

setNaturalAC.name: setNaturalAC
setNaturalAC.description: Sets the mobile's bonus armor class via `CMobile_SetBonusAC`; for players, also re-sends a status packet so the new AC reaches the client.

addHP.name: addHP
addHP.description: Adds `amount` to the mobile's current HP and sends a stat update via `VT_SEND_HP_UPDATE`.

addMana.name: addMana
addMana.description: Adds `amount` to the mobile's current mana via `VT_SET_MANA`.

addFatigue.name: addFatigue
addFatigue.description: Adds `amount` to the mobile's current stamina via `VT_SET_STAMINA`.

doDamageWithWeapon.name: doDamageWithWeapon
doDamageWithWeapon.cSignature: void Script_doDamageWithWeapon(uint32_t attacker, uint32_t defender, uint32_t weapon, int damage)
doDamageWithWeapon.description: Applies `damage` from `attacker` to `defender` using `weapon`, with combat initiation enabled; delegates to `doDamageCore`. Binary bug in `doDamageCore`: weapon lookup passes `defenderSerial` instead of `weaponSerial`.

doDamage.name: doDamage
doDamage.cSignature: void Script_doDamage(uint32_t attacker, uint32_t defender, int damage)
doDamage.description: Applies `damage` from `attacker` to `defender` with no specific weapon, combat initiation enabled; delegates to `doDamageCore` with `weaponSerial=0` and `damageType=0`.

doDamageFight.name: doDamageFight
doDamageFight.cSignature: void Script_doDamageFight(uint32_t attacker, uint32_t defender, int damage, int flag)
doDamageFight.description: Applies `damage` from `attacker` to `defender`; `flag` controls whether the hit also starts combat between them (1 = initiate, 0 = skip).

doDamageType.name: doDamageType
doDamageType.cSignature: void Script_doDamageType(uint32_t attacker, uint32_t defender, int damage, int type)
doDamageType.description: Applies typed damage from `attacker` to `defender` with combat initiation enabled; `type` is passed as the damage type to `Combat_DamageResolve`.

loseHP.name: loseHP
loseHP.description: Inflicts `amount` of unattributed damage on the mobile via `Combat_DamageResolve(NULL, defender, amount, NULL, 0)`.

loseMana.name: loseMana
loseMana.description: Subtracts `amount` from the mobile's current mana via `VT_SET_MANA`.

loseFatigue.name: loseFatigue
loseFatigue.description: Subtracts `amount` from the mobile's current stamina via `VT_SET_STAMINA`.

restoreMobile.name: restoreMobile
restoreMobile.description: Refills the mobile's HP, mana, and stamina to their respective maximums.

restoreFatigue.name: restoreFatigue
restoreFatigue.description: Refills the mobile's stamina to its maximum via `VT_SET_STAMINA`; the validation string in the binary is `"walk"` (copy-paste bug in original code).

restoreHP.name: restoreHP
restoreHP.description: Refills the mobile's HP to its maximum via `VT_SET_HP`; the validation string in the binary is `"walk"` (copy-paste bug in original code).

restoreMana.name: restoreMana
restoreMana.description: Refills the mobile's mana to its maximum via `VT_SET_MANA`.

getHeShe.name: getHeShe
getHeShe.description: Returns `"he"`, `"she"`, or `"it"` based on the mobile's sex (0 = male, 1 = female, other = neuter).

getHimHer.name: getHimHer
getHimHer.description: Returns `"him"`, `"her"`, or `"it"` based on the mobile's sex (0 = male, 1 = female, other = neuter).

getHisHer.name: getHisHer
getHisHer.description: Returns `"his"`, `"her"`, or `"its"` based on the mobile's sex (0 = male, 1 = female, other = neuter).

attack.name: attack
attack.description: Initiates combat between `attacker` and `victim` via `CombatInitiate`; both must be valid mobiles.

peace.name: peace
peace.description: Disengages every attacker from the mobile (`CMobile_DisengageAttackers`) and clears its own combat targets (`CMobile_StopCombat`), ending all combat it participates in.

stopAttack.name: stopAttack
stopAttack.description: Clears the mobile's combat target list via `CMobile_StopCombat`; other mobiles may still be attacking it.

stopFight.name: stopFight
stopFight.description: Removes `mob2` from `mob1`'s combat target list via `CMobile_StopFightWith`; does not touch the attacker list.

getAttackers.name: getAttackers
getAttackers.description: Clears `list` and appends the serial of every mobile in the mobile's attacker list.

getAttackersNearby.name: getAttackersNearby
getAttackersNearby.description: Clears `list` and appends the serials of attackers tracked by every mobile within range 8 of `serial`; binary bug: the end-iterator check references `mob`'s own attacker list instead of each nearby mobile's list (reproduced exactly from binary).

getNumTargets.name: getNumTargets
getNumTargets.description: Returns the number of entries in the mobile's combat target list.

getNumAttackers.name: getNumAttackers
getNumAttackers.description: Returns the number of entries in the mobile's attacker list; the validation string in the binary is `"getNumTargets"` (copy-paste bug in original code).

getFirstTarget.name: getFirstTarget
getFirstTarget.description: Returns the serial of the first entry in the mobile's combat target list, or 0 when the list is empty.

getTargets.name: getTargets
getTargets.description: Clears `out` then appends the serial of every entity in the mobile's combat target list.

hasObjEquipped.name: hasObjEquipped
hasObjEquipped.description: Returns 1 when `item` is currently equipped in any of the 26 equipment slots on `mobile`.

hasObjTypeEquipped.name: hasObjTypeEquipped
hasObjTypeEquipped.description: Returns 1 when any item whose body type equals `type` is equipped on `mobile`; rejects types above 0x4000.

getEquipSlot.name: getEquipSlot
getEquipSlot.description: Returns the entity's natural equipment layer byte; always returns 0 for mobiles.

getItemAtSlot.name: getItemAtSlot
getItemAtSlot.description: Returns the serial of the item equipped in `slot` (1–30) on `mobile`, or 0 when the slot is empty or out of range.

getWeapon.name: getWeapon
getWeapon.description: Returns the serial of the weapon currently wielded by `mobile`, or 0 when none.

getFreeHandSlot.name: getFreeHandSlot
getFreeHandSlot.description: Returns 1 (right hand) or 2 (left hand) for the first free hand slot on `mobile`, or 0 when both hands are occupied.

isArmed.name: isArmed
isArmed.description: Returns 1 when `mobile` currently wields a weapon.

isWeapon.name: isWeapon
isWeapon.description: Returns 1 when `entity` is a weapon item (vtable IsWeapon check).

isReallyWeapon.name: isReallyWeapon
isReallyWeapon.description: Returns 1 only when `entity` is a hand-slot weapon with melee or ranged damage flags (excludes shields).

handleWatchingSkill.name: handleWatchingSkill
handleWatchingSkill.description: Awards a passive observation gain on `skillId` for `mobile` at 100% cap.

testSkillReal.name: testSkillReal
testSkillReal.description: Returns the raw numeric result of a skill check on `skillId` for `mobile` without thresholding.

skillTestReal.name: skillTestReal
skillTestReal.description: Returns the raw numeric result of a skill check on `skillId` for `mobile` without thresholding.

testSkill.name: testSkill
testSkill.description: Returns 1 when a default skill check on `skillId` succeeds for `mobile`, 0 otherwise.

skillTest.name: skillTest
skillTest.description: Returns 1 when a default skill check on `skillId` succeeds for `mobile`, 0 otherwise.

getSkillSuccessChance.name: getSkillSuccessChance
getSkillSuccessChance.cSignature: int Script_getSkillSuccessChance(uint32_t serial, int skillId, int difficulty, int range)
getSkillSuccessChance.signature: int getSkillSuccessChance(obj mobile, int skillId, int difficulty, int range)
getSkillSuccessChance.description: Returns the computed success chance for `mobile` attempting `skillId` at the given `difficulty` (−1000 to 2000) and `range` (10–100); returns 0 or 1 outside those bounds.

testAndLearnSkill.name: testAndLearnSkill
testAndLearnSkill.cSignature: int Script_testAndLearnSkill(uint32_t serial, int skillId, int difficulty, int range)
testAndLearnSkill.signature: int testAndLearnSkill(obj mobile, int skillId, int difficulty, int range)
testAndLearnSkill.description: Performs a learning skill check for `mobile`, awarding skill gain on success; returns 1 on success.

addSatiety.name: addSatiety
addSatiety.description: Adds `amount` to `mobile`'s hunger byte, silently ignored when hunger is already at 100.

getSatiety.name: getSatiety
getSatiety.description: Returns the mobile's hunger byte, or 0 when not a valid mobile.

getRealStrength.name: getRealStrength
getRealStrength.description: Returns the mobile's base (unmodified) strength stat.

getRealDexterity.name: getRealDexterity
getRealDexterity.description: Returns the mobile's base (unmodified) dexterity stat.

getRealIntelligence.name: getRealIntelligence
getRealIntelligence.description: Returns the mobile's base (unmodified) intelligence stat.

getStrength.name: getStrength
getStrength.description: Returns the mobile's effective strength (base + bonus).

getDexterity.name: getDexterity
getDexterity.description: Returns the mobile's effective dexterity (base + bonus).

getIntelligence.name: getIntelligence
getIntelligence.description: Returns the mobile's effective intelligence (base + bonus).

getStat.name: getStat
getStat.description: Returns the mobile's effective value (base + bonus) for the given stat index (0=STR, 1=DEX, 2=INT).

getRealStat.name: getRealStat
getRealStat.description: Returns the mobile's base (unmodified) value for stat index `statId`.

getStatMod.name: getStatMod
getStatMod.description: Returns the mobile's bonus modifier for stat index `statId`.

modifyStat.name: modifyStat
modifyStat.cSignature: int Script_modifyStat(uint32_t serial, int statId, int value)
modifyStat.signature: int modifyStat(obj mobile, int statId, int value)
modifyStat.description: Adds `value` to the mobile's stat bonus for `statId`; returns the new bonus.

modifyRealStat.name: modifyRealStat
modifyRealStat.cSignature: int Script_modifyRealStat(uint32_t serial, int statId, int value)
modifyRealStat.signature: int modifyRealStat(obj mobile, int statId, int value)
modifyRealStat.description: Adds `value` to the mobile's base stat for `statId`; returns the new base value.

setStatMod.name: setStatMod
setStatMod.cSignature: int Script_setStatMod(uint32_t serial, int statId, int value)
setStatMod.signature: int setStatMod(obj mobile, int statId, int value)
setStatMod.description: Sets the mobile's bonus modifier for `statId` to `value`; returns the new bonus.

setRealStat.name: setRealStat
setRealStat.cSignature: int Script_setRealStat(uint32_t serial, int statId, int value)
setRealStat.signature: int setRealStat(obj mobile, int statId, int value)
setRealStat.description: Sets the mobile's base value for `statId` to `value`; returns the new base.

getStatAttributeMax.name: getStatAttributeMax
getStatAttributeMax.description: Returns max HP (`statId`=0), max stamina (`statId`=1), or max mana (`statId`=2) for `mobile`; returns 0 for other stat IDs.

setStatAttributeMax.name: setStatAttributeMax
setStatAttributeMax.cSignature: int Script_setStatAttributeMax(uint32_t serial, int statId, int value)
setStatAttributeMax.signature: int setStatAttributeMax(obj mobile, int statId, int value)
setStatAttributeMax.description: Sets max HP, stamina, or mana (by `statId` 0/1/2) on `mobile` via vtable; returns the stored value.

getSkillLevel.name: getSkillLevel
getSkillLevel.description: Returns the mobile's effective skill value for `skillId` divided by 10 (coarse tens-of-skill representation).

getSkillLevelReal.name: getSkillLevelReal
getSkillLevelReal.description: Returns the mobile's effective skill value for `skillId` without dividing by 10.

getSkillLevelRealStat.name: getSkillLevelRealStat
getSkillLevelRealStat.description: Identical to `getSkillLevelReal`; returns the mobile's effective skill value for `skillId` unscaled (binary deduplication of the same call).

getSkillLevelNoStat.name: getSkillLevelNoStat
getSkillLevelNoStat.description: Returns the mobile's total skill (base + bonus) for `skillId` without the stat-blending adjustment.

getSkillLevelNoStatNoMod.name: getSkillLevelNoStatNoMod
getSkillLevelNoStatNoMod.description: Returns the mobile's raw base skill value for `skillId` with no bonuses or stat blending applied.

setSkillLevel.name: setSkillLevel
setSkillLevel.cSignature: void Script_setSkillLevel(uint32_t serial, int skillId, int value)
setSkillLevel.signature: void setSkillLevel(obj mobile, int skillId, int value)
setSkillLevel.description: Sets the mobile's base skill value for `skillId` to `value`.

addSkillLevel.name: addSkillLevel
addSkillLevel.cSignature: void Script_addSkillLevel(uint32_t serial, int skillId, int delta)
addSkillLevel.signature: void addSkillLevel(obj mobile, int skillId, int delta)
addSkillLevel.description: Adds `delta` to the mobile's base skill value for `skillId`.

loseSkillLevel.name: loseSkillLevel
loseSkillLevel.cSignature: void Script_loseSkillLevel(uint32_t serial, int skillId, int delta)
loseSkillLevel.signature: void loseSkillLevel(obj mobile, int skillId, int delta)
loseSkillLevel.description: Subtracts `delta` from the mobile's base skill value for `skillId`.

getSkillMod.name: getSkillMod
getSkillMod.description: Returns the mobile's bonus modifier for `skillId`.

setSkillMod.name: setSkillMod
setSkillMod.cSignature: int Script_setSkillMod(uint32_t serial, int skillId, int value)
setSkillMod.signature: int setSkillMod(obj mobile, int skillId, int value)
setSkillMod.description: Sets the mobile's bonus modifier for `skillId` to `value`; returns the new bonus.

modifySkillMod.name: modifySkillMod
modifySkillMod.cSignature: int Script_modifySkillMod(uint32_t serial, int skillId, int delta)
modifySkillMod.signature: int modifySkillMod(obj mobile, int skillId, int delta)
modifySkillMod.description: Adds `delta` to the mobile's bonus modifier for `skillId`; returns the new bonus.

getSkillName.name: getSkillName
getSkillName.description: Stores the display name of `skillId` in the output string and returns it.

getSkillNumber.name: getSkillNumber
getSkillNumber.description: Looks up the skill index for `skillName`; returns −1 when no match is found.

setMobFlag.name: setMobFlag
setMobFlag.cSignature: void Script_setMobFlag(uint32_t serial, int flagId, int value)
setMobFlag.signature: void setMobFlag(obj mobile, int flagId, int value)
setMobFlag.description: Sets or clears status flag `flagId` on `mobile` according to `value`.

getMobFlag.name: getMobFlag
getMobFlag.description: Returns 1 when status flag `flagId` is set on `mobile`.

canWield.name: canWield
canWield.description: Returns 1 when `mobile` can equip `item` in its natural equipment slot.

isPiercing.name: isPiercing
isPiercing.description: Returns 1 when the weapon's type flags include the piercing bit (0x02).

isSlashing.name: isSlashing
isSlashing.description: Returns 1 when the weapon's type flags include the slashing bit (0x01).

isBashing.name: isBashing
isBashing.description: Returns 1 when the weapon's type flags include the bashing type.

isRanged.name: isRanged
isRanged.description: Returns 1 when the weapon is a ranged type (bow or crossbow).

getMaxArmorClass.name: getMaxArmorClass
getMaxArmorClass.description: Returns the weapon's maximum armor rating, or −1 when the weapon is invalid.

getCurArmorClass.name: getCurArmorClass
getCurArmorClass.description: Returns the weapon's effective armor rating (scaled by current durability), or −1 when invalid.

setMaxArmorClass.name: setMaxArmorClass
setMaxArmorClass.description: Sets the weapon's maximum armor rating; returns 1 on success, 0 when the weapon is invalid.

getWeaponCurHP.name: getWeaponCurHP
getWeaponCurHP.description: Returns the weapon's current durability, or −1 when the weapon is invalid.

setWeaponCurHP.name: setWeaponCurHP
setWeaponCurHP.description: Sets the weapon's current durability; returns 1 on success.

getWeaponMaxHP.name: getWeaponMaxHP
getWeaponMaxHP.description: Returns the weapon's maximum durability, or −1 when the weapon is invalid.

setWeaponMaxHP.name: setWeaponMaxHP
setWeaponMaxHP.description: Sets the weapon's maximum durability; returns 1 on success.

getWeaponMinStr.name: getWeaponMinStr
getWeaponMinStr.description: Returns the weapon's minimum strength requirement, or −1 when the weapon is invalid.

getWeaponSpeed.name: getWeaponSpeed
getWeaponSpeed.description: Returns the weapon's speed byte from its definition, or −10 when invalid.

getWeaponHitSfx.name: getWeaponHitSfx
getWeaponHitSfx.description: Returns the weapon's hit sound effect ID, or 0 when invalid.

getWeaponMissSfx.name: getWeaponMissSfx
getWeaponMissSfx.description: Returns the weapon's miss sound effect ID, or 0 when invalid.

getWeaponMinRange.name: getWeaponMinRange
getWeaponMinRange.description: Returns the weapon's minimum range byte, or −1 when invalid.

getAmmoType.name: getAmmoType
getAmmoType.description: Returns the weapon's ammo type (uint16), or −1 when invalid.

getBow.name: getBow
getBow.description: Returns the weapon's bow type code, or −1 when invalid.

getWeaponRange.name: getWeaponRange
getWeaponRange.description: Returns the weapon's melee range byte, or −1 when invalid.

getWeaponHandedness.name: getWeaponHandedness
getWeaponHandedness.description: Returns the weapon's handedness value via the weapon template.

getWeaponName.name: getWeaponName
getWeaponName.description: Stores the weapon's display name in `out`; returns an empty string when invalid.

getWeaponClass.name: getWeaponClass
getWeaponClass.cSignature: void Script_getWeaponClass(uint32_t serial, int *outNumDice, int *outDiceFaces, int *outBonus, int *outPad)
getWeaponClass.signature: void getWeaponClass(obj entity, int& numDice, int& diceFaces, int& bonus, int& pad)
getWeaponClass.description: Reads the damage dice (weapons) or armor-rating dice (mobiles) and unpacks them into four out-param integers; `pad` is always 0.

setWeaponClass.name: setWeaponClass
setWeaponClass.cSignature: void Script_setWeaponClass(uint32_t serial, int numDice, int diceFaces, int bonus, int pad)
setWeaponClass.signature: void setWeaponClass(obj entity, int numDice, int diceFaces, int bonus, int pad)
setWeaponClass.description: Builds a CDiceRoll from the given fields and stores it as the weapon's damage dice or the mobile's armor-rating dice; `pad` is ignored.

applyWeaponTemplate.name: applyWeaponTemplate
applyWeaponTemplate.description: Stamps `weapon` with all values from weapon definition `templateId`; returns 0 when the template is unknown.

getAverageDamage.name: getAverageDamage
getAverageDamage.description: Returns the average damage of the weapon computed from its embedded NdF+B damage dice.

getBackpack.name: getBackpack
getBackpack.description: Returns the serial of the mobile's backpack (slot 21) if it has accessible contents; falls back to the first other equipment slot with contents; returns 0 when none qualify.

transferGenericToContainer.name: transferGenericToContainer
transferGenericToContainer.cSignature: uint32_t Script_transferGenericToContainer(uint32_t containerSerial, uint32_t mobileSerial, uint32_t itemType, uint32_t count)
transferGenericToContainer.signature: obj transferGenericToContainer(obj container, obj mobile, int item_type, int count)
transferGenericToContainer.description: Removes `count` units of the stackable type `item_type` from `mobile`'s equipment (gold fallback for vendors) and places the resulting stack into `container`; returns the stack's serial or 0 on failure.

transferGenericToWorld.name: transferGenericToWorld
transferGenericToWorld.cSignature: uint32_t Script_transferGenericToWorld(CLocation *loc, uint32_t mobileSerial, uint32_t itemType, uint32_t count)
transferGenericToWorld.signature: obj transferGenericToWorld(loc location, obj mobile, int item_type, int count)
transferGenericToWorld.description: Removes `count` units of the stackable type `item_type` from `mobile`'s equipment and drops the stack at `location`; returns the stack's serial or 0 on failure.

destroyGeneric.name: destroyGeneric
destroyGeneric.cSignature: void Script_destroyGeneric(uint32_t mobileSerial, uint32_t itemType, uint32_t count)
destroyGeneric.signature: void destroyGeneric(obj mobile, int item_type, int count)
destroyGeneric.description: Removes `count` units of the stackable type `item_type` from `mobile`'s equipment and deletes the resulting stack outright.

giveItem.name: giveItem
giveItem.description: Places `item` into the first accessible container found in `mobile`'s equipment slots; returns the container's serial or 0 when no suitable container exists.

systemMessage.name: systemMessage
systemMessage.description: Sends a default-coloured system message string to the named player.

systemMessageHued.name: systemMessageHued
systemMessageHued.cSignature: void Script_systemMessageHued(uint32_t serial, int hue, CString *str)
systemMessageHued.signature: void systemMessageHued(obj player, int hue, string message)
systemMessageHued.description: Sends a system message (speech type 6, font 3) to the named player at the given hue.

getPlayAge.name: getPlayAge
getPlayAge.description: Returns the player's accumulated play-time counter, or 0 when the serial is not a valid player.

getAccountNum.name: getAccountNum
getAccountNum.description: Returns the player's account number, or 0 when the serial is not a valid player.

getCharacterNum.name: getCharacterNum
getCharacterNum.description: Returns the player's character slot index within the account, or 0 when not valid.

isGoldAccount.name: isGoldAccount
isGoldAccount.description: Returns 1 when the player's account is flagged as gold-tier, 0 otherwise.

getCombatMode.name: getCombatMode
getCombatMode.description: Returns 1 when the player has war mode active (mobile flag 0x40).

isInvulnerable.name: isInvulnerable
isInvulnerable.description: Returns 1 when the mobile has the invulnerable status flag set.

makeInvulnerable.name: makeInvulnerable
makeInvulnerable.description: Sets the mobile's invulnerable status flag via vtable dispatch.

makeVulnerable.name: makeVulnerable
makeVulnerable.description: Clears the mobile's invulnerable status flag via vtable dispatch.

isCorpse.name: isCorpse
isCorpse.description: Returns 1 when the entity is a valid corpse object, 0 otherwise.

getCorpseBodyType.name: getCorpseBodyType
getCorpseBodyType.description: Returns the 16-bit body type stored in the corpse object (`[entity+0xC4] & 0xFFFF`), or 0 when not a valid corpse.

textMessage.name: textMessage
textMessage.cSignature: int Script_textMessage(uint32_t serial, CString *text, int hue, int font, int speechType)
textMessage.signature: int textMessage(obj player, string text, int hue, int font, int speech_type)
textMessage.description: Sends a formatted speech packet to the player with explicit hue, font, and speech type; returns 1 on success.

superBark.name: superBark
superBark.cSignature: int Script_superBark(uint32_t serial, CString *text, int hue, int type, int font)
superBark.signature: int superBark(obj entity, string text, int hue, int type, int font)
superBark.description: Speaks text on behalf of any entity with explicit hue, speech type, and font; returns 1 on success.

getMobsInRangeOld.name: getMobsInRangeOld
getMobsInRangeOld.signature: void getMobsInRangeOld(list out, loc center, int range)
getMobsInRangeOld.description: Fills `out` with serials of all mobiles within Chebyshev distance `range` of `center` using the slow spatial-grid block walk; superseded by `getMobsInRange`.

getMobsInRange.name: getMobsInRange
getMobsInRange.signature: void getMobsInRange(list out, loc center, int range)
getMobsInRange.description: Fills `out` with serials of all NPCs and players within `range` of `center` using the fast entity-map index.

objIsInRange.name: objIsInRange
objIsInRange.description: Returns 1 when at least one non-mobile entity lies within Chebyshev distance `range` of `center`.

getObjectsInRange.name: getObjectsInRange
getObjectsInRange.signature: void getObjectsInRange(list out, loc center, int range)
getObjectsInRange.description: Fills `out` with serials of all non-mobile entities within Chebyshev distance `range` of `center`.

getObjectsInRangeWithFlags.name: getObjectsInRangeWithFlags
getObjectsInRangeWithFlags.cSignature: void Script_getObjectsInRangeWithFlags(CList *list, CLocation *loc, int range, int flags)
getObjectsInRangeWithFlags.signature: void getObjectsInRangeWithFlags(list out, loc center, int range, int flags)
getObjectsInRangeWithFlags.description: Fills `out` with serials of all entities in nearby spatial blocks whose tiledata flags include all bits of `flags`; uses block proximity only, no per-tile distance check.

getNumAllObjectsInRangeWithFlags.name: getNumAllObjectsInRangeWithFlags
getNumAllObjectsInRangeWithFlags.signature: int getNumAllObjectsInRangeWithFlags(loc center, int range, int flags)
getNumAllObjectsInRangeWithFlags.description: Returns the count of both dynamic and static entities within Chebyshev distance `range` of `center` whose tiledata flags include all bits of `flags`.

getTerrainFlags.name: getTerrainFlags
getTerrainFlags.description: Returns the land-tile data flags for `tile_id` masked with `mask`, or 0 when `tile_id` is outside `[0, 0x3FFF]`.

getObjectFlags.name: getObjectFlags
getObjectFlags.description: Returns the entity's tiledata flags ANDed with `mask`; mobiles always return 0.

getObjectsInRangeOfType.name: getObjectsInRangeOfType
getObjectsInRangeOfType.cSignature: void Script_getObjectsInRangeOfType(CList *list, CLocation *loc, int range, int bodyType)
getObjectsInRangeOfType.signature: void getObjectsInRangeOfType(list out, loc center, int range, int body_type)
getObjectsInRangeOfType.description: Fills `out` with serials of all entities within Chebyshev distance `range` of `center` whose body type matches `body_type`.

getObjectsInSpecRange.name: getObjectsInSpecRange
getObjectsInSpecRange.cSignature: void Script_getObjectsInSpecRange(CList *list, CLocation *loc, int minRange, int maxRange)
getObjectsInSpecRange.signature: void getObjectsInSpecRange(list out, loc center, int min_range, int max_range)
getObjectsInSpecRange.description: Fills `out` with serials of non-mobile entities whose Chebyshev distance from `center` is strictly between `min_range` and `max_range`.

getPlayersInRange.name: getPlayersInRange
getPlayersInRange.signature: void getPlayersInRange(list out, loc center, int range)
getPlayersInRange.description: Fills `out` with serials of all players within `range` of `center` using the fast player entity-map index.

getClosestMobile.name: getClosestMobile
getClosestMobile.description: Returns the serial of the mobile nearest to `center` within Chebyshev distance `range`, or 0 when none qualify.

getClosestPlayer.name: getClosestPlayer
getClosestPlayer.description: Returns the serial of the player nearest to `center` within Chebyshev distance `range`, or 0 when none qualify.

getClosestOnlinePlayer.name: getClosestOnlinePlayer
getClosestOnlinePlayer.description: Returns the serial of the online player nearest to `center` within Chebyshev distance `range`, or 0 when none qualify.

getClosestMobileOrOnlinePlayer.name: getClosestMobileOrOnlinePlayer
getClosestMobileOrOnlinePlayer.description: Returns the serial of the nearest NPC or online player within Chebyshev distance `range` of `center`, or 0 when none qualify.

getClosestVisibleOnlinePlayer.name: getClosestVisibleOnlinePlayer
getClosestVisibleOnlinePlayer.description: Like `getClosestOnlinePlayer` but excludes hidden players and dead players unless they have the ghost-visible flag set.

getNPCsInRangeOld.name: getNPCsInRangeOld
getNPCsInRangeOld.signature: void getNPCsInRangeOld(list out, loc center, int range)
getNPCsInRangeOld.description: Fills `out` with serials of all NPCs within Chebyshev distance `range` of `center` using the slow spatial-grid walk; superseded by `getNPCsInRange`.

getNPCsInRange.name: getNPCsInRange
getNPCsInRange.signature: void getNPCsInRange(list out, loc center, int range)
getNPCsInRange.description: Fills `out` with serials of all NPCs within `range` of `center` using the fast NPC entity-map index.

getTileAt.name: getTileAt
getTileAt.description: Returns the land tile ID at `position`, or 0 when the coordinates fall outside the world bounds.

getMobsAt.name: getMobsAt
getMobsAt.description: Fills `out` with serials of all mobiles sharing the exact x/y/z of `position`.

getNPCsAt.name: getNPCsAt
getNPCsAt.description: Fills `out` with serials of all NPCs sharing the exact x/y/z of `position`.

getPlayersAt.name: getPlayersAt
getPlayersAt.description: Fills `out` with serials of all players sharing the exact x/y/z of `position`.

getObjectsAt.name: getObjectsAt
getObjectsAt.description: Fills `out` with serials of all non-mobile entities sharing the exact x/y/z of `position`.

getObjectsAtInZRange.name: getObjectsAtInZRange
getObjectsAtInZRange.cSignature: void Script_getObjectsAtInZRange(CList *list, CLocation *loc, int zMin, int zMax)
getObjectsAtInZRange.signature: void getObjectsAtInZRange(list out, loc position, int z_min, int z_max)
getObjectsAtInZRange.description: Fills `out` with serials of non-mobile entities at `position`'s (x, y) whose z falls within `[z_min, z_max]`.

getFirstObjectOfType.name: getFirstObjectOfType
getFirstObjectOfType.description: Returns the serial of the first item near `position` whose body type matches `body_type`, or 0 when none qualify; pair with `getNextObjectOfType` to iterate.

getNextObjectOfType.name: getNextObjectOfType
getNextObjectOfType.cSignature: uint32_t Script_getNextObjectOfType(CLocation *loc, int bodyType, uint32_t lastSerial)
getNextObjectOfType.signature: obj getNextObjectOfType(loc position, int body_type, obj last)
getNextObjectOfType.description: Resumes the `getFirstObjectOfType` walk after `last`, returning the next matching serial near `position`, or 0 when none remain.

getQuantity.name: getQuantity
getQuantity.description: Returns the entity's stack amount: 1 for plain items or the effective resource quantity for resource-flagged items.

getMiscData.name: getMiscData
getMiscData.description: Returns the low 16 bits of the entity's sort-key field (misc/data field).

getQuality.name: getQuality
getQuality.description: Returns the tiledata layer (equipment-slot) byte for the entity's body type, despite the name.

getTileHeight.name: getTileHeight
getTileHeight.description: Returns the tiledata quantity (height) byte for body type `type`, or 0 when `type` is out of range `[0, 0x4000]`.

getHeight.name: getHeight
getHeight.description: Returns the entity's collision height: the tiledata height for items, or a fixed 16 for mobiles.

getSurfaceHeight.name: getSurfaceHeight
getSurfaceHeight.description: Returns the entity's walkable surface height (the z-offset clients step onto when standing on the entity). Uses the `"getHeight"` context string internally (copy-paste artifact).

safeLogOut.name: safeLogOut
safeLogOut.description: Logs the player out safely (`CPlayer_LogOut(player, 0)`), allowing a grace period before disconnect.

safeLogout.name: safeLogout
safeLogout.description: Logs the player out safely (`CPlayer_LogOut(player, 0)`), allowing a grace period before disconnect.

isHidden.name: isHidden
isHidden.description: Returns 1 when the entity has its hidden flag set.

setHidden.name: setHidden
setHidden.description: Sets or clears the entity's hidden flag based on `value`.

openGump.name: openGump
openGump.description: Sends an OPEN_GUMP packet to the player; when `gump_id` is 0x1392, uses serial 1 as the gump serial.

closeGump.name: closeGump
closeGump.description: Closes a gump on the player's client by sending an OPEN_GUMP packet with a zero serial; when `gump_id` is 0x1392, uses serial 0.

doMissile_Loc2Loc.name: doMissile_Loc2Loc
doMissile_Loc2Loc.cSignature: void Script_doMissile_Loc2Loc(CLocation *srcLoc, CLocation *dstLoc, int effectId, int speed, int duration, int hue)
doMissile_Loc2Loc.signature: void doMissile_Loc2Loc(loc src, loc dst, int effect_id, int speed, int duration, int hue)
doMissile_Loc2Loc.description: Plays a moving missile effect from one map location to another; batches into the AnimSequence if active, otherwise broadcasts immediately to nearby players.

doMissile_Loc2Mob.name: doMissile_Loc2Mob
doMissile_Loc2Mob.cSignature: void Script_doMissile_Loc2Mob(CLocation *srcLoc, uint32_t dstSerial, int effectId, int speed, int duration, int hue)
doMissile_Loc2Mob.signature: void doMissile_Loc2Mob(loc src, obj dst, int effect_id, int speed, int duration, int hue)
doMissile_Loc2Mob.description: Plays a moving missile effect from a location to a mobile's current position; supports AnimSequence batching.

doMissile_Mob2Loc.name: doMissile_Mob2Loc
doMissile_Mob2Loc.cSignature: void Script_doMissile_Mob2Loc(uint32_t srcSerial, CLocation *dstLoc, int effectId, int speed, int duration, int hue)
doMissile_Mob2Loc.signature: void doMissile_Mob2Loc(obj src, loc dst, int effect_id, int speed, int duration, int hue)
doMissile_Mob2Loc.description: Plays a moving missile effect from a mobile's current position to a location; supports AnimSequence batching.

doMissile_Mob2Mob.name: doMissile_Mob2Mob
doMissile_Mob2Mob.cSignature: void Script_doMissile_Mob2Mob(uint32_t srcSerial, uint32_t dstSerial, int effectId, int speed, int duration, int hue)
doMissile_Mob2Mob.signature: void doMissile_Mob2Mob(obj src, obj dst, int effect_id, int speed, int duration, int hue)
doMissile_Mob2Mob.description: Plays a moving missile effect between two mobiles' current positions; supports AnimSequence batching.

doLocAnimation.name: doLocAnimation
doLocAnimation.cSignature: void Script_doLocAnimation(CLocation *loc, int effectId, int speed, int duration, int hue, int renderMode)
doLocAnimation.signature: void doLocAnimation(loc position, int effect_id, int speed, int duration, int hue, int render_mode)
doLocAnimation.description: Plays a stationary graphical effect at a map location; supports AnimSequence batching (AnimSequence type 0).

doMobAnimation.name: doMobAnimation
doMobAnimation.cSignature: void Script_doMobAnimation(uint32_t serial, int effectId, int speed, int duration, int hue, int renderMode)
doMobAnimation.signature: void doMobAnimation(obj mobile, int effect_id, int speed, int duration, int hue, int render_mode)
doMobAnimation.description: Plays a stationary graphical effect at a mobile's current location; supports AnimSequence batching (AnimSequence type 1).

doLightning.name: doLightning
doLightning.description: Plays a lightning bolt effect at the mobile's location (EFFECT packet type 1); supports AnimSequence batching (AnimSequence type 2).

beginSequence.name: beginSequence
beginSequence.description: Starts an AnimSequence batch: sets `g_AnimSequence.state` to 1 if it was 0. Subsequent effect calls queue into the sequence rather than being sent immediately.

endSequence.name: endSequence
endSequence.description: Processes and broadcasts the accumulated AnimSequence using `action_id`, then clears the sequence state.

waitState.name: waitState
waitState.description: Returns the mobile's current wait-state action value (`CMobile_GetWaitStateAction`).

setWaitState.name: setWaitState
setWaitState.description: Sets the mobile's wait-state maximum to `value` and resets the wait-state tick counter to 0.

isInvisible.name: isInvisible
isInvisible.description: Returns 1 when the entity has its hidden flag set; functionally identical to `isHidden` but accepts any entity (not just mobiles).

setInvisible.name: setInvisible
setInvisible.description: Sets or clears the entity's hidden flag; functionally identical to `setHidden`.

setPoisoned.name: setPoisoned
setPoisoned.description: Sets or clears the mobile's poisoned flag (mobile flag bit 4) based on `value`.

setCursed.name: setCursed
setCursed.description: Sets or clears the mobile's cursed flag (mobile flag bit 8) based on `value`.

getName.name: getName
getName.description: Returns the entity's display name, or an empty string when the entity is not found.

getRealName.name: getRealName
getRealName.description: Returns the mobile's real (non-disguised) name, or an empty string when the mobile is not found.

setRealName.name: setRealName
setRealName.description: Sets the mobile's real name to `name` via `CMobile_SetName`.

setRealNameFromTemplate.name: setRealNameFromTemplate
setRealNameFromTemplate.description: Sets the mobile's real name to the name associated with `template_id` in the template manager.

getTitledName.name: getTitledName
getTitledName.description: Returns the player's paperdoll title string (e.g. "Lord John Smith"), or "Flobbitz" when the player is not found.

walkTo.name: walkTo
walkTo.cSignature: void Script_walkTo(uint32_t serial, CLocation *loc, int range)
walkTo.signature: void walkTo(obj npc, loc destination, int range)
walkTo.description: Tells an NPC to pathfind toward `destination` stopping within `range` tiles; aborts the current script thread if the entity is not an NPC.

isInMap.name: isInMap
isInMap.description: Returns 1 when `position` lies inside the playable map bounds.

isInWorld.name: isInWorld
isInWorld.description: Returns 1 when `position` falls within the absolute world coordinate bounds (broader check than `isInMap`).

getElevationAt.name: getElevationAt
getElevationAt.description: Returns the average land Z at map coordinates (x, y), or 0 when the coordinates fall outside the map.

findGoodSpotNear.name: findGoodSpotNear
findGoodSpotNear.cSignature: int Script_findGoodSpotNear(CLocation *loc, int zMax, int range, int height)
findGoodSpotNear.signature: int findGoodSpotNear(loc position, int z_max, int range, int height)
findGoodSpotNear.description: Finds a usable spawn position near `position` within `range` tiles, capped at `z_max`; modifies `position` in place and returns 1 on success.

findGoodSpotNearMin.name: findGoodSpotNearMin
findGoodSpotNearMin.cSignature: int Script_findGoodSpotNearMin(CLocation *loc, int zMin, int zMax, int range, int height)
findGoodSpotNearMin.signature: int findGoodSpotNearMin(loc position, int z_min, int z_max, int range, int height)
findGoodSpotNearMin.description: Like `findGoodSpotNear` but restricts valid z values to the range `[z_min, z_max]`; modifies `position` in place and returns 1 on success.

findGoodSpotNearWithElev.name: findGoodSpotNearWithElev
findGoodSpotNearWithElev.cSignature: int Script_findGoodSpotNearWithElev(CLocation *loc, int minElev, int maxElev, int zMax, int range, int height)
findGoodSpotNearWithElev.signature: int findGoodSpotNearWithElev(loc loc, int minElev, int maxElev, int zMax, int range, int height)
findGoodSpotNearWithElev.description: Finds a valid spawn location near `loc` within the given elevation and range constraints; returns 1 on success. _(builtin [210])_

findGoodZ.name: findGoodZ
findGoodZ.cSignature: int Script_findGoodZ(CLocation *loc, int currentZ, int direction, int stepHeight, int height)
findGoodZ.signature: int findGoodZ(loc loc, int currentZ, int direction, int stepHeight, int height)
findGoodZ.description: Returns the resting Z for a mobile of the given height walking onto `loc` from `currentZ` in `direction`; returns -128 for out-of-map coordinates. _(builtin [213])_

canExistAt.name: canExistAt
canExistAt.cSignature: int Script_canExistAt(CLocation *loc, int currentZ, int stepHeight)
canExistAt.signature: int canExistAt(loc loc, int currentZ, int stepHeight)
canExistAt.description: Returns 1 if an entity with the given step height can stand at `loc` starting from `currentZ`. _(builtins [214], [480])_

canSeeLoc.name: canSeeLoc
canSeeLoc.description: Returns 1 if the entity has line-of-sight to `loc` via raycast from its eye height. _(builtin [481])_

canSeeObj.name: canSeeObj
canSeeObj.description: Returns 1 if entity A can see entity B (accounts for hidden mobiles; same entity always returns 1). _(builtin [478])_

getVisableTargets.name: getVisableTargets
getVisableTargets.description: Fills `list` with the serials of all visible (non-hidden) combat targets of the mobile. _(builtin [616])_

getFirstVisableTarget.name: getFirstVisableTarget
getFirstVisableTarget.description: Returns the serial of the first non-hidden, visible combat target of the mobile, or 0 if none. _(builtin [617])_

getFirstVisableTargetInRange.name: getFirstVisableTargetInRange
getFirstVisableTargetInRange.description: Like `getFirstVisableTarget` but additionally requires the target to be within Chebyshev distance `range`. _(builtin [618])_

isValid.name: isValid
isValid.description: Returns 1 if `serial` resolves to a live entity in the world, 0 otherwise. _(builtin [482])_

getNameByType.name: getNameByType
getNameByType.description: Returns the tiledata name string for `typeId`; returns "BUG!" for out-of-range values. _(builtin [500])_

getX.name: getX
getX.description: Returns the x component of a loc value. _(builtin [501])_

getY.name: getY
getY.description: Returns the y component of a loc value. _(builtin [502])_

getZ.name: getZ
getZ.description: Returns the z component of a loc value. _(builtin [503])_

setX.name: setX
setX.description: Writes `value` into the x component of `loc` (in-place mutation via loc* out-param). _(builtin [504])_

setY.name: setY
setY.description: Writes `value` into the y component of `loc`. _(builtin [505])_

setZ.name: setZ
setZ.description: Writes `value` into the z component of `loc`. _(builtin [506])_

moveDir.name: moveDir
moveDir.description: Steps `loc` one tile in compass direction `dir` (0=N, 1=NE, …, 7=NW). _(builtin [507])_

replyTo.name: replyTo
replyTo.cSignature: void Script_replyTo(uint32_t npcSerial, uint32_t targetSerial, CString *speechStr)
replyTo.signature: void replyTo(obj npcSerial, obj targetSerial, string speechStr)
replyTo.description: Looks up the NPC's conversation response to `speechStr` from `target` and schedules it as a speech event 5 ticks later. _(builtin [509])_

replyToMobAbout.name: replyToMobAbout
replyToMobAbout.cSignature: void Script_replyToMobAbout(uint32_t speakerSerial, uint32_t targetSerial, uint32_t aboutSerial, CString *speechStr)
replyToMobAbout.signature: void replyToMobAbout(obj speakerSerial, obj targetSerial, obj aboutSerial, string speechStr)
replyToMobAbout.description: Like `replyTo` but includes a third-party mobile reference in the conversation lookup; schedules any reply 5 ticks later. _(builtin [510])_

getResourceTypeIdByName.name: getResourceTypeIdByName
getResourceTypeIdByName.description: Looks up a resource type by name and stores its numeric id in the out-param `retval`; returns 1 on hit, 0 if not found. _(builtin [551], typeSig `iIs`)_

hasResource.name: hasResource
hasResource.description: Returns 1 if the entity carries any resource node of the given type id. _(builtin [552])_

getStaticObjectsAt.name: getStaticObjectsAt
getStaticObjectsAt.description: Fills `list` with the art ids of every static item at the (x, y) of `loc`, ignoring z. _(builtins [493], [494])_

getStaticObjectsAtXY.name: getStaticObjectsAtXY
getStaticObjectsAtXY.description: Fills `list` with the art ids of every static item at the (x, y) of `loc`, ignoring z. _(builtins [493], [494])_

getStaticObjectsAtXYZ.name: getStaticObjectsAtXYZ
getStaticObjectsAtXYZ.description: Like `getStaticObjectsAt` but additionally matches z, so only statics at the exact (x, y, z) are appended. _(builtin [495])_

hasObj.name: hasObj
hasObj.description: Returns 1 if the mobile has the specified item (by serial) in any equipment slot or nested container. _(builtin [553])_

hasObjType.name: hasObjType
hasObjType.description: Returns 1 if the mobile has any item of the given body type in equipment slots or nested containers. _(builtin [554])_

hasObjTypeInBank.name: hasObjTypeInBank
hasObjTypeInBank.description: Returns 1 if the mobile's bank box (equipment slot 29) contains an item of the given body type. _(builtin [555])_

containsObj.name: containsObj
containsObj.description: Returns 1 if the container (recursively) holds the specified entity. _(builtin [512])_

containsObjType.name: containsObjType
containsObjType.description: Recursively searches the container for an item of the given body type; returns its serial or 0. _(builtins [513], [415])_

takeMoney [415].name: takeMoney [415]
takeMoney [415].description: Recursively searches the container for an item of the given body type; returns its serial or 0. _(builtins [513], [415])_

getTopmostContainer.name: getTopmostContainer
getTopmostContainer.description: Walks the parent chain of the entity and returns the serial of the topmost container, or 0 if the entity is not contained. _(builtin [259])_

mobileContainsObj.name: mobileContainsObj
mobileContainsObj.description: Returns 1 if the mobile has the target entity anywhere in its equipment slots or contents (recursive). _(builtin [514])_

mobileContainsObjType.name: mobileContainsObjType
mobileContainsObjType.description: Searches the mobile's equipment and contents recursively for an item of the given body type; returns its serial or 0. _(builtin [516])_

getObjectsOfTypeIn.name: getObjectsOfTypeIn
getObjectsOfTypeIn.cSignature: void Script_getObjectsOfTypeIn(CList *list, uint32_t containerSerial, int typeId)
getObjectsOfTypeIn.signature: void getObjectsOfTypeIn(list list, obj containerSerial, int typeId)
getObjectsOfTypeIn.description: Recursively finds all items of the given body type inside a container (including nested containers and mobile equipment) and appends their serials to `list`. _(builtin [515])_

getContainersOnMobile.name: getContainersOnMobile
getContainersOnMobile.description: Fills `list` with the serials of all containers currently equipped by the mobile. _(builtin [517])_

useItem.name: useItem
useItem.description: Programmatically triggers a use-item action by `player` on `item`, firing UseObject/UseItem events with tile-flag fallback. _(builtin [518])_

getTemplate.name: getTemplate
getTemplate.description: Returns the entity's template index (lower 16 bits), or 0 if the serial is unknown. _(builtin [483])_

becomeTemplate.name: becomeTemplate
becomeTemplate.description: Applies template `templateId` to the mobile, replacing body type, stats, and equipment. _(builtin [486])_

getDefaultAlignment.name: getDefaultAlignment
getDefaultAlignment.description: Returns the alignment value declared by template `templateId`, or 0 if the template does not exist. _(builtin [484])_

setAlignment.name: setAlignment
setAlignment.description: Sets the mobile's alignment (0–3); values outside this range are silently ignored. _(builtin [485])_

isAtHome.name: isAtHome
isAtHome.description: Returns 1 if the entity is at its home location according to the engine's home-location check. _(builtin [487])_

thinksItsAtHome.name: thinksItsAtHome
thinksItsAtHome.description: Returns 1 if a non-mobile, non-contained item is physically sitting at the location stored in its "home" ObjVar. _(builtin [488])_

hasHome.name: hasHome
hasHome.description: Returns 1 if the NPC has the home-location behavior flag set. _(builtin [489])_

getHome.name: getHome
getHome.description: Returns the NPC's home location; falls back to (-1, -1, 0) for invalid serials. _(builtin [490])_

setHome.name: setHome
setHome.description: Sets the NPC's home location to `loc` and clears the auxiliary homeInfo3 field. _(builtin [491])_

getCreationLoc.name: getCreationLoc
getCreationLoc.description: Returns the entity's creation-time location; falls back to (-1, -1, 0) for invalid serials. _(builtin [492])_

doLookAt.name: doLookAt
doLookAt.description: Performs a programmatic look-at on `target` from the player's perspective. _(builtin [519])_

getArticle.name: getArticle
getArticle.description: Returns the article prefix for the tile type ("a", "an", "the", or ""); returns "BUG!" for out-of-range typeId. _(builtin [520])_

getResource.name: getResource
getResource.cSignature: int Script_getResource(int *outAmount, uint32_t serial, CString *resName, int resType, int flags)
getResource.signature: int getResource(int &outAmount, obj serial, string resName, int resType, int flags)
getResource.description: Stores the quantity of the named resource on the entity in `outAmount`; flags 0 = template slot, 2 = ObjVar table. Returns 1 on success. _(builtin [548], typeSig `iIosii`)_

getResourcesOnObj.name: getResourcesOnObj
getResourcesOnObj.cSignature: int Script_getResourcesOnObj(uint32_t serial, int flags, CList *list)
getResourcesOnObj.signature: int getResourcesOnObj(obj serial, int flags, list list)
getResourcesOnObj.description: Appends the internal names of all resource nodes on the entity whose type matches `flags` to `list`; returns 1. _(builtin [549])_

getResourceName.name: getResourceName
getResourceName.description: Looks up the resource type by internal name `inStr` and returns its localized name selected by `resId` (0=food, 1=name1, 2=name2, 3=name3). _(builtin [550])_

updateHint.name: updateHint
updateHint.cSignature: void Script_updateHint(int hintId, uint32_t serial, int flags, CString *name1, CString *name2, CLocation *loc, uint32_t objSerial, CString *name3, int param)
updateHint.signature: void updateHint(int hintId, obj serial, int flags, string name1, string name2, loc loc, obj objSerial, string name3, int param)
updateHint.description: Allocates a CHintItem populated from the arguments and registers it with the global hint manager. _(builtin [574], typeSig `vioisscosi`)_

getHint.name: getHint
getHint.cSignature: int Script_getHint(uint32_t serial, int flags, int *outInt1, uint32_t *outInt2, int *outInt3, CString *outStr1, CString *outStr2, CLocation *outLoc, uint32_t *outObjSerial, CString *outStr3, int *outParam)
getHint.signature: int getHint(obj serial, int flags, int &outInt1, obj &outInt2, int &outInt3, string &outStr1, string &outStr2, loc &outLoc, obj &outObjSerial, string &outStr3, int &outParam)
getHint.description: Looks up a hint by (serial, flags) and unpacks all its fields into output parameters; returns 1 on hit, 0 otherwise. _(builtin [575], typeSig `ioiIOISSCOSI`)_

shopKeeperOpenBusiness.name: shopKeeperOpenBusiness
shopKeeperOpenBusiness.description: Opens the vendor's buy window for the player. _(builtin [496])_

shopKeeperOpenBuying.name: shopKeeperOpenBuying
shopKeeperOpenBuying.description: Opens the vendor's sell window for the player. _(builtin [497])_

hasShopKeyword.name: hasShopKeyword
hasShopKeyword.description: Returns 1 if `list` contains any of the shop-related keywords (buy, trade, commerce, merchant, shop, purchase, business, open, shopkeeper, trader, tradesman, shopkeep), case-insensitive. _(builtin [498])_

mobileWillBuy.name: mobileWillBuy
mobileWillBuy.description: Returns 1 if the vendor NPC is willing to buy the specified item. _(builtin [499])_

objToStr.name: objToStr
objToStr.description: Converts `serial` to its decimal string representation. _(builtin [521])_

scoreToSpace.name: scoreToSpace
scoreToSpace.description: Replaces all underscore characters in `str` with spaces (in-place). _(builtin [522])_

getLocalizedDesc.name: getLocalizedDesc
getLocalizedDesc.signature: int getLocalizedDesc(string &outStr, loc &outLoc, loc inLoc1, loc inLoc2)
getLocalizedDesc.description: Returns the localized region description for the bounding box [inLoc1, inLoc2]; stores the region name in `outStr` and its centre in `outLoc`. _(builtin [576], typeSig `iSCcc`)_

isInRegionWithPrefix.name: isInRegionWithPrefix
isInRegionWithPrefix.description: Returns 1 if `loc` lies within any region whose name starts with `prefix`. _(builtin [578], typeSig `iSc`)_

getSmallestArea.name: getSmallestArea
getSmallestArea.description: Stores the name of the smallest-area region containing `loc` in `outName`; returns 1 on hit, 0 if no region contains the location. _(builtin [577], typeSig `iSc`)_

getTrammelPhase.name: getTrammelPhase
getTrammelPhase.description: Returns the current Trammel moon phase (0–7). _(builtin [579])_

getFeluccaPhase.name: getFeluccaPhase
getFeluccaPhase.description: Returns the current Felucca moon phase (0–7). _(builtin [580])_

getBookPages.name: getBookPages
getBookPages.description: Returns the page count for a book entity (from bookPages ObjVar or tiledata fallback), or 0 if not found. _(builtin [706])_

setROBookNum.name: setROBookNum
setROBookNum.description: Sets the entity's bookNum ObjVar to the lower 16 bits of `bookNum`. _(builtin [744])_

getROBookTitle.name: getROBookTitle
getROBookTitle.description: Returns the title string for read-only book number `bookNum`. _(builtin [705])_

getMoonPhaseStr.name: getMoonPhaseStr
getMoonPhaseStr.description: Returns a one-character moon-phase glyph (char 0x80 + phase) for valid phases 0–7, or " invalid phase " for out-of-range values. _(builtin [581])_

getMoonGateDest.name: getMoonGateDest
getMoonGateDest.description: Returns the moongate destination index calculated as `(arg + trammelPhase - feluccaPhase + 8) % 8`. _(builtin [582])_

splitDice.name: splitDice
splitDice.cSignature: void Script_splitDice(CString *diceStr, CString *prefixOut, int *numDiceOut, int *facesOut, CString *sepOut, int *bonusOut)
splitDice.signature: void splitDice(string diceStr, string &prefixOut, int &numDiceOut, int &facesOut, string &sepOut, int &bonusOut)
splitDice.description: Parses a dice expression "[+/-/!]NdF[+/-/!]B" into its sign prefix, numDice, faces, separator, and bonus out-params. _(builtin [610], typeSig `vsSIISI`)_

getLightTime.name: getLightTime
getLightTime.description: Returns the mobile's remaining light duration. _(builtin [546])_

getLightVal.name: getLightVal
getLightVal.description: Returns the mobile's light brightness value. _(builtin [545])_

setLight.name: setLight
setLight.cSignature: void Script_setLight(uint32_t serial, int lightVal, int lightTime)
setLight.signature: void setLight(obj serial, int lightVal, int lightTime)
setLight.description: Sets both the brightness and duration of the mobile's light effect. _(builtin [547])_

makeDice.name: makeDice
makeDice.cSignature: void Script_makeDice(CString *out, CString *base, int numDice, int faces, CString *sep, int bonus)
makeDice.signature: void makeDice(string &out, string base, int numDice, int faces, string sep, int bonus)
makeDice.description: Builds a dice expression string from components into `out`; omits the dice term when `faces` is 0, and the bonus term when `sep` is empty or `bonus` is 0. _(builtin [609], typeSig `vSsiisi`)_

makeMultiInst.name: makeMultiInst
makeMultiInst.cSignature: uint32_t Script_makeMultiInst(CLocation *loc, uint32_t bodyType, int flags)
makeMultiInst.signature: obj makeMultiInst(loc loc, obj bodyType, int flags)
makeMultiInst.description: Creates a multi of `bodyType` anchored at `loc` and returns its serial; returns 0 on failure. `flags` is accepted but ignored. _(builtin [624])_

makeMultiInstCheck.name: makeMultiInstCheck
makeMultiInstCheck.cSignature: uint32_t Script_makeMultiInstCheck(CLocation *loc, uint32_t bodyType, int x, int y, intptr_t z, int checkNum, int artworkId, int validate, int flags)
makeMultiInstCheck.signature: obj makeMultiInstCheck(loc loc, obj bodyType, int x, int y, int &result, int checkNum, int artworkId, int validate, int flags)
makeMultiInstCheck.description: Creates a multi instance with extended placement validation; the 5th argument is an int* output (typeSig `I`). Returns multi serial or 0. _(builtin [625], typeSig `ociiiIiii`)_

moveMulti.name: moveMulti
moveMulti.description: Moves a multi entity to the given location; returns result of the move or 0 if entity is invalid or not a multi. _(builtin [626])_

canMultiExistAt.name: canMultiExistAt
canMultiExistAt.cSignature: int Script_canMultiExistAt(uint32_t serial, CLocation *loc, int moveType)
canMultiExistAt.signature: int canMultiExistAt(obj serial, loc loc, int moveType)
canMultiExistAt.description: Checks whether the multi entity can exist at `loc` using the given move type; returns 0 for invalid or non-multi entities. _(builtin [645])_

moveMultiCheck.name: moveMultiCheck
moveMultiCheck.cSignature: int Script_moveMultiCheck(uint32_t serial, CLocation *loc, int checkFlag)
moveMultiCheck.signature: int moveMultiCheck(obj serial, loc loc, int checkFlag)
moveMultiCheck.description: Moves a multi with extended validation governed by `checkFlag`; returns 0 for invalid or non-multi entities. _(builtin [627])_

recycleMulti.name: recycleMulti
recycleMulti.description: Recycles a multi entity of `bodyType` back to the multi pool and updates its artwork; returns the recycle result or 0. _(builtin [628])_

recycleMultiCheck.name: recycleMultiCheck
recycleMultiCheck.cSignature: int Script_recycleMultiCheck(uint32_t serial, int bodyType, int checkFlag)
recycleMultiCheck.signature: int recycleMultiCheck(obj serial, int bodyType, int checkFlag)
recycleMultiCheck.description: Recycles a multi with extended checks governed by `checkFlag`; returns 0 for invalid or non-multi entities. _(builtin [629])_

recycleMultiCheckRotate.name: recycleMultiCheckRotate
recycleMultiCheckRotate.cSignature: int Script_recycleMultiCheckRotate(uint32_t serial, int bodyType, int rotation, int checkFlag)
recycleMultiCheckRotate.signature: int recycleMultiCheckRotate(obj serial, int bodyType, int rotation, int checkFlag)
recycleMultiCheckRotate.description: Recycles a multi with checks and rotation; returns 0 for invalid or non-multi entities. _(builtin [630])_

moveMultiMapSwitch.name: moveMultiMapSwitch
moveMultiMapSwitch.cSignature: int Script_moveMultiMapSwitch(uint32_t serial, CLocation *loc, int mapId)
moveMultiMapSwitch.signature: int moveMultiMapSwitch(obj serial, loc loc, int mapId)
moveMultiMapSwitch.description: Moves a multi entity to a different map via CMultiSlave::MapSwitchMove; returns 0 for invalid or non-multi entities. _(builtin [631])_

debugMessage.name: debugMessage
debugMessage.description: Sends `message` as a system message to the player registered as the current entity's "debugger" ObjVar; no-op if no debugger is set. _(builtin [508])_

scriptTrig.name: scriptTrig
scriptTrig.cSignature: void Script_scriptTrig(uint32_t serial, int trigType, uint32_t objArgSerial)
scriptTrig.signature: void scriptTrig(obj target, int trigType, obj objArg)
scriptTrig.description: Fires an event of type `trigType` on `target` with `objArg` as argument; only event types 1, 2, 7, 11–13, 16–17, 23, 28, 39–42, 60 are permitted — all others terminate the thread.

processTriggerCmds.name: processTriggerCmds
processTriggerCmds.description: Spatial trigger/event bus: iterates ObjVars named `cmd{type}0`–`cmd{type}9` on the source entity, finds nearby entities (Chebyshev < 15, radius 10 blocks) carrying the same linked name, then dispatches `activate`/`deactivate` events or copies/removes conditional ObjVars on each target; recursion depth capped at 32.

withdrawFromBank.name: withdrawFromBank
withdrawFromBank.description: Subtracts `amount` gold from the mobile's bank and equips the resulting stack into the mobile's backpack; returns 1 on success, 0 on failure.

withdrawAndDestroy.name: withdrawAndDestroy
withdrawAndDestroy.description: Same as `withdrawFromBank` but destroys the gold item instead of placing it in the backpack; returns 1 on success, 0 on failure.

depositIntoBank.name: depositIntoBank
depositIntoBank.cSignature: int Script_depositIntoBank(uint32_t mobileSerial, uint32_t entitySerial, int amount)
depositIntoBank.signature: int depositIntoBank(obj mobile, obj entity, int amount)
depositIntoBank.description: Deposits `entity` into the mobile's bank box; returns 2 on invalid arguments, otherwise passes through the bank-deposit result code.

openBank.name: openBank
openBank.description: Opens the bank gump for the player (self-open, no teller NPC required) and stamps the player's current location into the `bankOpenLoc` ObjVar.

amtGoldInBank.name: amtGoldInBank
amtGoldInBank.description: Returns the total gold amount in the mobile's bank box, or -1 when the serial is invalid.

getDecayCount.name: getDecayCount
getDecayCount.description: Returns the entity's current decay counter (low byte), or -10 when the serial is invalid.

getDecayMax.name: getDecayMax
getDecayMax.description: Returns the world's global decay-counter cap (low byte), or -10 when the serial is invalid.

setDecayCount.name: setDecayCount
setDecayCount.description: Sets the entity's decay counter; negative values are stored as 0xFF; returns 1 on success, 0 when the serial is invalid.

getHomeDecayRate.name: getHomeDecayRate
getHomeDecayRate.description: Returns the world's home-region decay rate (low byte).

getNonHomeDecayRate.name: getNonHomeDecayRate
getNonHomeDecayRate.description: Returns the world's non-home decay rate (low byte).

getDefaultDieDecay.name: getDefaultDieDecay
getDefaultDieDecay.description: Returns the world's default death-triggered decay cap (low byte).

getDecayInterval.name: getDecayInterval
getDecayInterval.description: Returns the per-bucket decay interval scaled by 2^16 (`decayInterval << 16 / bucketsPerTick`), or 0 when no buckets are scanned per tick.

setLooksLikeTemplate.name: setLooksLikeTemplate
setLooksLikeTemplate.description: Sets the mobile's alternate body type so it visually displays as `templateId` without changing its real template.

followNpc.name: followNpc
followNpc.cSignature: void Script_followNpc(uint32_t serial, uint32_t leaderSerial, int range)
followNpc.signature: void followNpc(obj npc, obj leader, int range)
followNpc.description: Puts the NPC into following state, tracking `leader` within `range`; passing `range=0` also clears the wander-radius behavior flag.

stopFollowing.name: stopFollowing
stopFollowing.description: Stops an NPC from following its leader and returns it to idle; `followObj2` (the remembered leader) is intentionally left set.

getLeader.name: getLeader
getLeader.description: Returns the serial of the NPC's current follow leader, or 0 if it is not following anyone or is not an NPC.

deleteIfValid.name: deleteIfValid
deleteIfValid.description: Deletes the entity only when its body type matches `bodyType`; refreshes any items that were resting on top of it afterward.

deleteIfValidNoFall.name: deleteIfValidNoFall
deleteIfValidNoFall.description: Like `deleteIfValid` but does not refresh items that were resting on top of the deleted entity.

changeRange.name: changeRange
changeRange.cSignature: int Script_changeRange(uint32_t serial, int isString, int oldValue, int newValue)
changeRange.signature: int changeRange(obj entity, int isString, int oldValue, int newValue)
changeRange.description: Searches the entity's ObjVar list for an entry with value `oldValue` and replaces it with `newValue`; `isString=0` targets int ObjVars, nonzero targets string ObjVars; returns 1 on success, 0 on failure.

isMultiComp.name: isMultiComp
isMultiComp.description: Returns 1 when the entity is a component of a multi structure (has a non-null multi pointer).

isMultiSlave.name: isMultiSlave
isMultiSlave.description: Returns 1 when the entity is a slave component of a multi (same check as `isMultiComp`).

getMultiSlaveId.name: getMultiSlaveId
getMultiSlaveId.description: Returns the master serial of the multi the entity belongs to, or 0 when the entity is not a multi component.

getMultiComponentOffset.name: getMultiComponentOffset
getMultiComponentOffset.description: Returns the entity's XYZ offset relative to its multi master, or (-1,-1,-1) when the entity is not a multi component.

areObjectsOn.name: areObjectsOn
areObjectsOn.description: Returns 1 when at least one object exists at the XYZ position immediately above the entity (entity's Z + effective height).

getMultiExtents.name: getMultiExtents
getMultiExtents.signature: int getMultiExtents(int typeId, loc minLoc, loc maxLoc)

getPulseNum.name: getPulseNum

isValidMap.name: isValidMap
isValidMap.description: Returns 1 when the entity is a map item with nonzero width and height extents.

setMapProperties.name: setMapProperties

copybook.name: copybook

isOnMulti.name: isOnMulti
